name: Expansion Licensed
description: Licensed material from Bohemia Interactive (ADPL-SA) containing vehicle models, textures, and assets for the Expansion suite.
overview:
DayZ-Expansion-Licensed contains licensed material from Bohemia Interactive that has been licensed under ADPL-SA (Arma Development Public License – Share Alike).

This mod is required alongside Expansion Core for the vehicle system and other features that use licensed content. It does not have its own configuration files — it provides assets consumed by other Expansion modules like Vehicles.

## License Terms

- **Attribution** — You must attribute the material as specified by the author or licensor
- **Noncommercial** — You may not use this material for any commercial purposes
- **Arma and DayZ Only** — You may not convert or adapt this material for use in other games
- **Share Alike** — If you adapt or build upon this material, you must distribute under the same license
installation: Place the @ExpansionLicensed folder in your server's root directory.
Both clients and servers must have this mod loaded.

troubleshooting.solution: Ensure @ExpansionLicensed is installed and loaded. Both client and server must have it.
Make sure the mod version matches between client and server. Check .bikey files in the keys directory.
